task_completion.description: Agent opened the specification file to read the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'control_surface_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the baseline model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP application window is open with the 'eCRM-001_wing_tail' model loaded, visible in the geometry browser or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Agent added an Inboard Flap control surface to the Wing component with the correct spanwise parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Sub-Surface panel for the Wing component showing a 'Control Surface' with U Start set to 0.10 and U End set to 0.42.

task_completion.description: Agent added an Outboard Aileron control surface to the Wing component with the correct spanwise parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Sub-Surface panel for the Wing component showing a 'Control Surface' with U Start set to 0.64 and U End set to 0.96.

task_completion.description: Agent added an Elevator control surface to the Horiz component with the correct spanwise parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP Sub-Surface panel for the Horiz component showing a 'Control Surface' with U Start set to 0.08 and U End set to 0.92.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the modified model with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog, the OpenVSP title bar showing 'eCRM001_with_controls.vsp3', or a file manager/terminal showing the new file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenVSP graphical interface (Geometry Browser, Sub-Surface panel) rather than editing the .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The sub-surfaces were genuinely created within the OpenVSP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The control surfaces are visible in the OpenVSP Sub-Surface list and/or the 3D viewer, not just typed out as text.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands executing Python or VSP scripts to automatically generate the control surfaces.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected control surface parameters are: Inboard Flap (Wing) U Start = 0.10, U End = 0.42; Outboard Aileron (Wing) U Start = 0.64, U End = 0.96; Elevator (Horiz) U Start = 0.08, U End = 0.92. The final model should be saved as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_with_controls.vsp3.
